message:
docs: clarify free vs premium CLI features and pricing

README.md:
- Add "CLI: Free vs Premium" section listing free commands (list, search,
  show, copy, export, render, suggest, bundles, categories, tags, status,
  refresh, open, doctor, about, completion, update-cli, interactive browser)
  and premium commands (login, logout, whoami, save, notes, collections,
  sync, --mine/--saved/--all flags)
- Include Pro subscription pricing ($10/month) and link

docs/cli-premium-integration.md:
- Add premium pricing notice with subscription link

packages/cli/src/commands/help.ts:
- Add premium_notice field to help data JSON output
- Add pricing notice below Premium section header in human-readable output

.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md:
- Add bug report issue template

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+---
+name: Bug report
+about: Report a problem with the public site or the free CLI
+labels: bug
+---
+
+## What happened?
+Describe the bug and what you expected to happen.
+
+## Where did it happen?
+- Web app URL (if applicable):
+- CLI version (`jfp --version`):
+- OS + version:
+
+## Steps to reproduce
+1.
+2.
+3.
+
+## Logs / output
+Paste any relevant CLI output with `--json` if possible.
+
+## Premium feature note
+If the issue is about `jfp` premium features (login, save, notes, collections, sync, or `--mine/--saved/--all`), those require a paid Pro subscription.
+Pricing: https://pro.jeffreysprompts.com/pricing
+
+If you believe you are subscribed and still blocked, mention the account email and command used.

@@ -172,6 +172,23 @@ Claude Code skills are managed in **Jeffrey's Skills.md** (`jsm`). Use JFP for p
 | **Single Binary** | Bun-compiled, no runtime dependencies |
 | **Cross-Platform** | Linux, macOS, Windows builds |
 
+### CLI: Free vs Premium (Paid)
+
+The `jfp` CLI is **open source** and free for the public prompt registry.  
+Premium features require an active Pro subscription (**$10/month**) at:
+https://pro.jeffreysprompts.com/pricing
+
+**Free (no subscription required):**
+- `jfp list`, `jfp search`, `jfp show`, `jfp copy`, `jfp export`, `jfp render`, `jfp suggest`
+- `jfp bundles`, `jfp bundle`, `jfp categories`, `jfp tags`
+- `jfp status`, `jfp refresh`, `jfp open`, `jfp doctor`, `jfp about`, `jfp completion`, `jfp update-cli`
+- `jfp i` (interactive browser)
+
+**Premium (paid Pro required):**
+- `jfp login`, `jfp logout`, `jfp whoami`
+- `jfp save`, `jfp notes`, `jfp collections`, `jfp sync`
+- `jfp list --mine`, `jfp search --mine`, `jfp list --saved`, `jfp search --saved`, `jfp search --all`
+
 ---
 
 ## The jfp CLI

@@ -9,6 +9,11 @@ The CLI provides a bridge between the free prompt registry and premium features:
 - **Free Tier**: Full access to the public prompt registry, install prompts as Claude Code skills
 - **Premium Tier**: Personal library, collections, skills marketplace, sync for offline access
 
+Premium features require an active Pro subscription (**$10/month**) at:
+https://pro.jeffreysprompts.com/pricing
+
+The `jfp` CLI itself is open source and free for the public prompt registry.
+
 ## Authentication Flow
 
 ### Local Browser-Based Login (Default)
